gpt55_review_summary: Fermat the 2nd found bundle-launched g5 metadata and legacy wrapper fallback gaps; both were fixed and covered by tests.
scope: document_kv_cache.vllm_smoke, document_kv_cache.databricks_vllm_smoke_job, restaurant_kv_serving.databricks_vllm_smoke_job, Databricks vLLM smoke bundle templates, and focused tests.
verification: PYTHONPATH=src pytest -q tests/test_vllm_smoke.py tests/test_databricks_vllm_smoke_job.py tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_template_resources.py -> 139 passed; PYTHONPATH=src pytest -q -> 1968 passed
what_changed: Threaded V1 hardware_target through vLLM smoke config, metadata, benchmark-runner args, Databricks run-submit payloads, bundle templates, and legacy compatibility fallback.
why: A real g5.8xlarge Databricks run emitted aws-g6-l4 benchmark suite metadata because the inner vLLM smoke runner always used the default hardware target.
